_comment: TV Scheduler — schedule config. Edit this file to change times, videos, or screen targets. No page changes needed.
_format: time = HH:MM 24h. days = [0..6] (0=Sun, 1=Mon, ..., 6=Sat). screens = [ids] or ['all']. max_duration_sec = safety stop timer.

schedule._description: Morning announcement, every day, all screens
Lunch promo, weekdays only, lobby + canteen screens
Weekend special, Saturday and Sunday only
